<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ADD LOCAL STORAGE JS</title>

<style>
*{
    box-sizing:border-box;
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
    font-family:Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;
}

body{
    min-height:100vh;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    align-items:center;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e293b,#334155);
    padding:20px;
}

.card{
    width:100%;
    max-width:500px;
    background:#fff;
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:30px;
    box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
}

h1{
    text-align:center;
    margin-bottom:25px;
    color:#0f172a;
    font-size:28px;
    letter-spacing:1px;
}

.form-group{
    margin-bottom:18px;
}

label{
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:8px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#334155;
}

input{
    width:100%;
    padding:14px 16px;
    border:2px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius:12px;
    font-size:16px;
    transition:.2s;
}

input:focus{
    outline:none;
    border-color:#2563eb;
    box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(37,99,235,.15);
}

button{
    width:100%;
    border:none;
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:15px;
    font-size:16px;
    font-weight:700;
    cursor:pointer;
    color:#fff;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#1d4ed8);
    transition:.2s;
}

button:hover{
    transform:translateY(-2px);
}

.info{
    margin-top:20px;
    text-align:center;
    color:#64748b;
    font-size:14px;
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<div class="card">
    <h1>ADD LOCAL STORAGE JS</h1>

    <div class="form-group">
        <label for="txtKey">Key</label>
        <input type="text" id="txtKey" placeholder="Nhập key...">
    </div>

    <div class="form-group">
        <label for="txtValue">Value</label>
        <input type="text" id="txtValue" placeholder="Nhập value...">
    </div>

    <button id="btnSave">Xác nhận</button>

    <div class="info">
        Dữ liệu sẽ được lưu vào Local Storage của trình duyệt.
    </div>
</div>

<script>
document.getElementById("btnSave").addEventListener("click", function () {

    const key = document.getElementById("txtKey").value.trim();
    const value = document.getElementById("txtValue").value;

    if (!key) {
        alert("Vui lòng nhập Key");
        return;
    }

    localStorage.setItem(key, value);

    document.getElementById("txtKey").value = "";
    document.getElementById("txtValue").value = "";

    alert("Success");
});

setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>

</body>
</html>
